user.title: Connect to sub2API
user.description: Enter the HTTPS address of the sub2API site and the two tokens from the signed-in browser's Local Storage. Model API keys cannot access subscription data.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to sub2API
reauth_confirm.description: The saved session can no longer be refreshed. Enter a new token pair from the same account.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the sub2API site.
error.invalid_auth: The access or refresh token is invalid.
error.invalid_response: The site returned an unsupported response.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTPS site address.
error.wrong_account: These tokens belong to a different account.

abort.already_configured: This sub2API account is already configured.
